trip_info.title: Portugal 2026 Family Trip
trip_info.guests: Darshan & Rika join in Algarve Aug 6-10

days.title: ARRIVE PORTO
days.subtitle: Settle in & soak up the atmosphere

activities.name: Arrive Porto, check into Boon House
activities.notes: €440 (3 nights). Rest, settle in.

activities.name: São Bento Station tiles
activities.notes: Free. 10 min. Stunning azulejos!

activities.name: Dinner near Aliados
activities.notes: ~€35-45 family. Simple tasca — soup, salads, veggie sides.

days.kids_note: Easy first day! São Bento is just a quick photo stop.

days.title: PORTO HIGHLIGHTS
days.subtitle: Harry Potter bookshop, bridge walk, cable car, francesinhas

activities.name: Livraria Lello
activities.notes: €8/adult, free <12. 30 min. BOOK IN ADVANCE! Harry Potter vibes!

activities.name: Walk to Ribeira district
activities.notes: Free. Downhill! 15 min. Colorful waterfront.

activities.name: Rabelo boat cruise
activities.notes: €17/adult, €8/child, free <3. 50 min. Six Bridges tour. Low-key, scenic.

activities.name: Gaia Cable Car
activities.notes: €8/adult, €5/child. 5 min ride. Best Douro views!

activities.name: Quick cellar photo stop (exterior)
activities.notes: Free. See the historic port cellars from outside

activities.name: Lunch in Gaia or walk back to Porto
activities.notes: €35-45 family. Simple local spot — caldo verde soup, salads, bread, cheese

activities.name: Walk Dom Luís I Bridge
activities.notes: Free. Lower deck = stroller-friendly. Upper deck = thrilling!

activities.name: REST BREAK at hotel
activities.notes: Nap time!

activities.name: Crystal Palace Gardens
activities.notes: Free. 2-3 hrs. Peacocks, shaded playground, duck ponds. Let kids run wild!

activities.name: Francesinha at Café Santiago
activities.notes: €14-18/sandwich (share between adults). Simple salads/bread for kids.

days.kids_note: Lello bookshop = magical for 7-yr-old! Cable car + cruise = exciting. Crystal Palace = let them RUN. Francesinha is Porto's signature dish — adults try it, kids get simple sides.

days.title: DOURO VALLEY SCENIC TRAIN
days.subtitle: Train through terraced vineyards (skip boat — train views are better!)

activities.name: Train Porto São Bento → Régua → Pinhão
activities.notes: €14/adult one-way, free <4. 2.5 hrs. Stunning terraced vineyards FROM THE TRAIN! Pack snacks + tablet.

activities.name: Arrive Pinhão. See blue-tile train station
activities.notes: Free. Beautiful azulejos. 5 min photo stop

activities.name: Walk Pinhão village, explore riverside
activities.notes: Free. Charming tiny village. Kids can run safely.

activities.name: Lunch in Pinhão
activities.notes: ~€40 family. Simple local tasca — soup, salads, omelets, bread, cheese

activities.name: Walk to Quinta do Bomfim gardens
activities.notes: 10 min walk from village. Free entry to grounds. SKIP wine tasting — just explore!

activities.name: Quinta gardens & viewpoint
activities.notes: Free (grounds), 1 hr. Kids run in open vineyard terraces. Parents get epic photos.

activities.name: Train Pinhão → Porto
activities.notes: €14/adult, 2.5 hrs. Kids should nap on return!

activities.name: Arrive Porto
activities.notes: Earlier return = less exhausted!

activities.name: Foz do Douro seaside
activities.notes: Free. Flat promenade, natural rock pools, ice cream. Perfect wind-down!

activities.name: Dinner at Brasão Aliados
activities.notes: ~€40-50 family. Francesinhas, salads, veggie sides.

days.kids_note: Trains = exciting! Scenery from the train IS the experience. Quinta gardens = open vineyard spaces to run. Foz rock pools = sensory play heaven.
days.tip: Why skip the Pinhão boat? You're already ON the train beside the river for 2.5 hours — the views are stunning! The boat would show the same scenery.

days.title: PICK UP CAR 1 — Porto → Aveiro → Tomar
days.subtitle: Get rental car, canal boat, head to Tomar

activities.name: Uber to Porto Airport
activities.notes: From Boon House, ~20 min

activities.name: PICK UP CAR 1
activities.notes: Porto Airport. Confirm child seats installed!

activities.name: Drive to Aveiro
activities.notes: 1 hr south

activities.name: Aveiro canal boat (moliceiro)
activities.notes: €15/adult, €8/child. 45 min. Colorful boats!

activities.name: Ovos moles + old town
activities.notes: €2-3/pastry. Sweet egg pastries — kids love!

activities.name: Costa Nova beach
activities.notes: 10 min. Famous stripy houses. Quick photo + run on sand

activities.name: Lunch
activities.notes: ~€35-45 family. Pizza, pasta, or local tasca

activities.name: Drive to Tomar
activities.notes: 2 hrs. Kids nap in car!

activities.name: Check into Os Marias Airbnb
activities.notes: Olalhas, near Castelo de Bode reservoir

activities.name: Tomar Old Town & River Walk
activities.notes: Free. Waterwheel, playground by river

activities.name: Dinner in Tomar
activities.notes: Kids run in the square

days.kids_note: Drive splits into manageable chunks. Canal boat = mini-adventure. Playground by river = perfect arrival activity.

days.title: KNIGHTS & ISLAND CASTLES
days.subtitle: Full medieval immersion — THE highlight day

activities.name: Convento de Cristo
activities.notes: €10/adult, free <12. 2.5 hrs. Knights Templar fortress! UNMISSABLE!

activities.name: Walk to town for lunch
activities.notes: Downhill walk, or drive

activities.name: REST BREAK at Airbnb
activities.notes: Nap time. Recharge for afternoon adventure.

activities.name: Drive to Castelo de Almourol
activities.notes: 30 min drive south

activities.name: Almourol Castle (island!)
activities.notes: €2/person boat, castle free. Island fortress! KIDS WILL LOVE THIS!

activities.name: Drive back
activities.notes: 30 min

activities.name: Castelo de Bode Reservoir
activities.notes: Free. Crystal-clear freshwater. Optional.

days.kids_note: Two castles in one day! Templar castle is huge — don't rush it. Almourol = boat ride alone is thrilling. Reservoir swim optional but great cool-down.

days.title: CHECKOUT & TRANSIT TO LISBON (via Caves, Batalha, Óbidos)
days.subtitle: Long transit day with optional stops — flexible by design

activities.name: Breakfast, pack, check out
activities.notes: Take your time

activities.name: Drive to Grutas de Mira de Aire
activities.notes: 50 min west (toward coast)

activities.name: Cave tour (Portugal's largest!)
activities.notes: €7.90/adult, €5.20/child, free <6. 110m underground! Nirupa's priority!

activities.name: Drive to Fátima Sanctuary
activities.notes: ~20 min. OPTIONAL — skip if behind schedule or kids are tired

activities.name: Fátima Sanctuary (optional)
activities.notes: Free. 15 min quick stop. Impressive scale but not essential.

activities.name: Drive to Batalha Monastery
activities.notes: ~20 min from Fátima (or 35 min direct from caves if you skipped Fátima)

activities.name: Lunch near Batalha
activities.notes: ~€35-45 family

activities.name: Batalha — Unfinished Chapels
activities.notes: €8/adult, free <12. 1 hr. Roofless chapel open to sky = iconic!

activities.name: Drive to Óbidos
activities.notes: 1 hr. OPTIONAL — skip if kids are done

activities.name: Óbidos Walled Town (optional)
activities.notes: Free. Walk ON TOP of medieval walls! Ice cream. 1-1.5 hrs.

activities.name: Drive to Lisbon
activities.notes: 1 hr from Óbidos, 1.5 hrs from Batalha if you skipped Óbidos

activities.name: Check into Holiday Inn Lisbon – Continental
activities.notes: ✅ BOOKED (on points)

activities.name: DROP OFF Car 1
activities.notes: One-way rental complete!

activities.name: Easy dinner near hotel
activities.notes: No more forced activities — long day done

days.kids_note: Caves = mind-blowing (underground lake!). If they're still good after caves → hit Batalha (best medieval stop). If energy holds → add Óbidos (walk walls). If anyone's melting down → skip stops and drive straight to Lisbon. Decision points: 11:45 AM (after caves), 2 PM (after lunch), 3 PM (after Batalha).
days.tip: FLEX STRATEGY: This is checkout day + 4 stops. Fátima and Óbidos are optional — skip either/both if kids are tired. Caves are non-negotiable (Nirupa's favorite). Batalha is the best medieval stop (roofless chapels). Make real-time calls after caves (11:45 AM) and after lunch (~2 PM). If kids are melting down, drive straight to Lisbon and rest at hotel.

days.title: LISBON — REST DAY + OCEANÁRIO
days.subtitle: First unscheduled morning, then aquarium + splash fountains

activities.name: Sleep in! Lazy hotel breakfast
activities.notes: No alarms. First morning without driving in 4 days.

activities.name: Unstructured morning
activities.notes: Pool at hotel? Walk Parque Eduardo VII? Kids' call.

activities.name: Lunch near hotel or in Parque das Nações
REST / Nap at hotel
activities.notes: Genuine downtime. No forced activity.

activities.name: Oceanário de Lisboa
activities.notes: €25/adult, free <3, ~€17 ages 4-12. Europe's BEST aquarium! Otters, sharks, rays, sunfish. 1.5 hrs. Kids will be mesmerized.

activities.name: Splash Fountains + Playground (Parque das Nações)
activities.notes: Free. Same complex! Kids run through water. Bring swimsuits/change clothes.

activities.name: Dinner at Time Out Market or Parque das Nações
activities.notes: Uber 15 min to Time Out. Everyone picks their own stall!

days.kids_note: First genuinely unscheduled morning since Porto. Oceanário = absolute highlight (otters for 3-yr-old, sharks for 7-yr-old). Splash fountains right after = perfect combo.

days.title: LISBON — HISTORIC CORE
days.subtitle: Tram, castle, funicular + Santa Justa hack

activities.name: Metro to Tram 28 stop (Martim Moniz)
activities.notes: €3.80/ride. GO EARLY — by 9:30 sardines + pickpockets!

activities.name: Ride Tram 28 through Alfama + Graça
activities.notes: The tram itself IS the experience

activities.name: Walk to Castelo de São Jorge
activities.notes: €15/adult, free <12. Castle walls, peacocks, city panorama!

activities.name: Walk down through Alfama
activities.notes: Free. Downhill! Winding streets, laundry lines

activities.name: Lunch at Time Out Market
activities.notes: €10-20/person. Food hall — everyone picks own stall! Solves picky eaters.

activities.name: REST BREAK at hotel
activities.notes: Nap time. Lisbon is hilly!

activities.name: Ascensor da Bica
activities.notes: €3.80/ride. Super steep funicular. 3 min of thrills!

activities.name: Walk Bairro Alto / Chiado
activities.notes: Free. Shops, street performers, tiles

activities.name: Santa Justa Elevator viewpoint (LOCAL HACK!)
activities.notes: Walk up Rua do Carmo to Carmo Square, access from TOP. €1.50 or free with coffee! Skip the 60-min tourist line!

activities.name: Dinner near Bairro Alto
activities.notes: Simple local tasca — soup, salads, eggs

days.kids_note: Tram 28 early = essential. Castle has peacocks! Bica funicular SHORT but thrilling. Time Out Market = no dinner arguments.
days.tip: Santa Justa LOCAL HACK: Walk up Rua do Carmo to Carmo Square (10 min uphill). Access the viewing platform from the TOP for €1.50 or free with a coffee. Skip the 60-minute tourist line at the bottom!

days.title: BELÉM & RIVERSIDE
days.subtitle: Iconic landmarks + waterfront

activities.name: Tram/Uber to Belém
activities.notes: 20 min from center

activities.name: Pastéis de Belém
activities.notes: €1.40/tart. THE original since 1837. Warm, cinnamon. Go early!

activities.name: Belém Tower + Monument (exterior)
activities.notes: Free. DON'T go inside. Walk waterfront, photos, kids run on plaza.

activities.name: Jardim de Belém playground
activities.notes: Free. Good playground. Let kids burn energy.

activities.name: Lunch in Belém
activities.notes: Simple local café — prato do dia with veggie option

activities.name: REST BREAK at hotel
activities.notes: Nap / quiet time

activities.name: Walk Ribeira das Naus riverfront
activities.notes: Free. Flat waterfront promenade, steps into Tagus

activities.name: LX Factory (optional, quick visit)
activities.notes: Free. Warehouse market. 1 hr max. Skip if kids tired.

activities.name: Dinner near hotel
activities.notes: Simple restaurant — pasta, salads, veggie options

days.kids_note: Pastéis de Belém = kids go CRAZY for warm custard! Belém waterfront wide and flat. LX Factory optional — keep brief.

days.title: SINTRA — PALACES, TUNNELS & CASTLE
days.subtitle: Fairy-tale palaces + secret wells + medieval ramparts

activities.name: Train Rossio → Sintra
activities.notes: ~€4.60 return. 40 min. Frequent trains.

activities.name: Grab pastry at Piriquita
activities.notes: ~€3-4. Travesseiros — local specialty!

activities.name: Uber/tuk-tuk to Quinta da Regaleira
activities.notes: €5-10 for tuk-tuk. ARRIVE AT OPENING!

activities.name: Quinta da Regaleira
activities.notes: €12/adult, free <5. 2 hrs. Underground tunnels + 27m spiral well! KIDS' FAVORITE!

activities.name: Tuk-tuk up to Moorish Castle
activities.notes: €5-10 ride

activities.name: Moorish Castle ramparts
activities.notes: €8/adult, free <6. 1 hr. Medieval ruins, EPIC views! Kids love climbing the walls.

activities.name: Quick lunch in Sintra town
activities.notes: Simple café — sandwiches, salads

activities.name: Bus 434 or tuk-tuk to Pena Palace
activities.notes: Just 5 min from Moorish Castle!

activities.name: Pena Palace (exterior + gardens)
activities.notes: €14/adult, free <6. 1 hr. Colorful 'Disney castle'! Skip interior (long queue), gardens are FREE and best part.

activities.name: Head back down to station
activities.notes: Bus or tuk-tuk

activities.name: Train back to Lisbon
activities.notes: 40 min. Kids may doze.

activities.name: REST / Pack for Algarve tomorrow
activities.notes: Organize for beach days!

days.kids_note: Quinta da Regaleira = FAVORITE of whole trip. Spiral well, dark tunnels, waterfall = pure magic. Moorish Castle = kids LOVE climbing ramparts. Pena Palace exterior is best — skip interior queue.
days.tip: Don't drive to Sintra (parking nightmare). Take the train!

days.title: PICK UP CAR 2 — LISBON → ALGARVE
days.subtitle: Drive to the beach! Group assembles! 🎉 Darshan & Rika arrive!

activities.name: Leisurely hotel breakfast
activities.notes: No rush — packing and prep

activities.name: Check out of Holiday Inn
activities.notes: Load bags in Uber

activities.name: Uber to Lisbon Airport
activities.notes: ~15 min from Holiday Inn

activities.name: PICK UP CAR 2 (upgraded larger vehicle)
activities.notes: Lisbon Airport. Confirm child seats! Fits the whole group.

activities.name: Lunch at airport food court or nearby
activities.notes: Light meal before drive

activities.name: Final bathroom break, kids ready for car
activities.notes: Load snacks, water, set up tablets. Text D&R: 'On our way!'

activities.name: 🚗 START DRIVE to Faro Airport
activities.notes: 2.5 hrs Lisbon→Faro via A2. KIDS NAP TIME! Aim to reach Faro arrivals around 2:50 PM.

activities.name: 🎉 Darshan & Rika LAND at Faro Airport (FAO)
activities.notes: easyJet EZY8532 from London Gatwick (LGW) lands at 14:50 (2:50 PM local).

activities.name: Pick up Darshan & Rika at FAO Arrivals
activities.notes: 40-min buffer for deplaning + baggage claim. Text them when you arrive!

activities.name: Drive to Armação de Pêra with D&R
activities.notes: ~40 min from Faro to Armação. Everyone together! 6 people in upgraded Car 2.

activities.name: Arrive + Check into Casa Margarida
activities.notes: ✅ BOOKED. 3 bedrooms, 6 people, AC. Check-in 5 PM or later — host flexible!

activities.name: Unpack, settle in, show D&R around
activities.notes: Quick unpack. Kids show D&R their rooms. Everyone relaxes.

activities.name: Quick local beach walk — Praia Grande de Pêra
activities.notes: 5 min walk from casa. Stretch legs after travel. Quick dip or just feet in water!

activities.name: Welcome dinner in Armação de Pêra
activities.notes: Nice seafood restaurant in town — group of 6! Celebrate the reunion!

days.kids_note: After a 2.5-hour drive + settling in, don't force a 40-min detour to Lagos. Local beach is RIGHT THERE. Save Lagos for Day 13 when you'll do it properly.
days.tip: Base: Armação de Pêra — Central Algarve! Drive times: Benagil ~15 min, Praia da Marinha ~10 min, Lagos ~40 min, Sagres ~55 min, Silves ~15 min, Faro Airport ~40 min.

days.title: BENAGIL CAVE BOAT + PRAIA DA MARINHA
days.subtitle: Bucket-list boat trip + Portugal's most beautiful beach

activities.name: Drive to departure point
activities.notes: Albufeira or Portimão marina (~20 min). BOOK IN ADVANCE!

activities.name: Benagil Cave Catamaran + Dolphins
activities.notes: €45-60/adult, €25-35/child. 2-3 hrs. Cathedral-ceiling cave + wild dolphins! Life jackets for kids.

activities.name: Lunch at marina
activities.notes: Simple café — sandwiches, salads

activities.name: Drive to Praia da Marinha
activities.notes: ~15 min, basically on the way home

activities.name: Praia da Marinha — beach time
activities.notes: One of Portugal's most beautiful beaches. Clear water, dramatic cliffs. Steep stairs down!

activities.name: Head back to Casa Margarida
activities.notes: Only 10 min home

activities.name: Rest / downtime
activities.notes: Real rest. Local beach or just chill. No forced activity.

activities.name: Dinner in Armação de Pêra
activities.notes: Group dinner — book a table for 6!

days.kids_note: THE catamaran = BIG experience — dolphins huge hit! BOOK IN ADVANCE (August!). Morning = calmer seas. Praia da Marinha is on the way back (not a detour). Afternoon = genuine rest, they'll be tired from the boat.
days.tip: No Ponta da Piedade today — that's a 40-min special trip from your base. You'll see it properly on the Lagos day (Day 13).

days.title: LAGOS + SAGRES LOOP — The Big Day Out
days.subtitle: Golden cliffs, fortress, continent's edge — one epic loop

activities.name: Drive to Lagos
activities.notes: ~40 min via A22 from Armação de Pêra

activities.name: Ponta da Piedade
activities.notes: Free. Dramatic golden sea stacks + grottoes. Short clifftop walk. Mind the kids near edges!

activities.name: Praia Dona Ana
activities.notes: Stunning sheltered cove beach. Swim + sandcastles.

activities.name: Lunch in Lagos Old Town
activities.notes: Walk the pretty streets, pick a restaurant. Veggie options plentiful.

activities.name: Drive to Sagres
activities.notes: ~30 min along the coast

activities.name: Sagres Fortress
activities.notes: €3/adult, free <12. Windswept fort at continent's edge. Wide open spaces — kids can run!

activities.name: Drive to Cape St. Vincent
activities.notes: 10 min from Sagres

activities.name: Cape St. Vincent — 'End of the World'
activities.notes: Free. Europe's south-western tip. Dramatic cliffs, lighthouse. VERY windy — hold onto hats/kids!

activities.name: Drive back to Armação de Pêra
activities.notes: ~1 hr via A22 (inland route, faster)

activities.name: Arrive home — rest
activities.notes: Wind down. ~2.5-3 hrs total driving today.

activities.name: Group dinner — Armação or Albufeira
activities.notes: Nice restaurant, book for 6!

days.kids_note: Biggest driving day in Algarve (~2.5-3 hrs total). Dona Ana beach = break for running around. Sagres/Cape = quick stops, wide open. They'll sleep in the car on the way back. Combine it all in one loop — no backtracking!
days.tip: Route logic: Armação → Lagos (40m) → Sagres (30m) → Cape (10m) → home (1hr). Total ~2.5 hrs driving, all west-to-east progression. Much smarter than doing these as separate day trips.

days.title: REST DAY — Last Full Day with D&R 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
days.subtitle: Easy local day together. D&R fly home tomorrow morning.

activities.name: Breakfast at Casa Margarida
activities.notes: Slow morning. No airport drive today.

activities.name: Local beach time — Praia Grande de Pêra
activities.notes: Walkable, easy, low-stress family morning.

activities.name: Lunch in Armação de Pêra
activities.notes: Keep it local and simple.

activities.name: Chill at Casa Margarida / pool time
activities.notes: Pack slowly for tomorrow. Keep energy for travel day.

activities.name: Farewell dinner with D&R
activities.notes: Final evening together before tomorrow's airport drop.

activities.name: REST at casa & final pack for tomorrow
activities.notes: Early night recommended. Faro drop + Lisbon drive tomorrow.

days.kids_note: True recovery day: beach + pool + easy dinner. Keep everyone fresh for tomorrow's airport drop and Lisbon drive.
days.tip: No Faro run today. D&R fly out tomorrow (Mon Aug 10, 11:35 AM), so keep this day light and pack tonight.

days.title: ALGARVE → FARO AIRPORT (D&R drop) → LISBON
days.subtitle: Drop D&R for 11:35 AM flight, then drive north

activities.name: Checkout + load bags
activities.notes: Light breakfast/snacks. Start early for Faro airport drop.

activities.name: Drive to Faro Airport with D&R
activities.notes: ~40 min from Armação de Pêra. Everyone in Car 2 together for final ride.

activities.name: 👋 Drop D&R at FAO Departures
activities.notes: easyJet EZY8532 to London Gatwick departs 11:35 AM. 3-hour buffer for security + bag check. Say goodbye!

activities.name: 🚗 Start drive to Lisbon
activities.notes: ~2.5-3 hrs via A2. Early start = beat traffic. Optional lunch/coffee break en route.

activities.name: Arrive Lisbon airport area
activities.notes: Lunch near airport before car return.

activities.name: 🚗 DROP OFF CAR 2 at airport rental desk
activities.notes: Car returned! No 5 AM stress tomorrow. Fuel check + return complete.

activities.name: Check into Holiday Inn Express Airport
activities.notes: 5 min walk from terminal. Drop all bags. REST! ✅ BOOKED (on points)

activities.name: REST at hotel — shower, unwind, relax
activities.notes: Everyone decompress. Kids watch TV. Parents rest. Long afternoon nap. No agenda!

activities.name: Early dinner near hotel OR order room service
activities.notes: Simple, easy. Walk to nearby restaurant or order in. No Uber to city tonight — just REST!

activities.name: Final packing & organize for flight
activities.notes: Make sure everything's ready for 4:30 AM wake-up!

activities.name: BED! EARLY!
activities.notes: Set multiple alarms! Flight is 7:35 AM. Sleep by 9 PM = 7.5 hrs before 4:30 AM wake-up!

days.kids_note: Early Faro drop-off, then long nap window in the car to Lisbon. Arrive Lisbon by noon = full afternoon rest at hotel before flight tomorrow.
days.tip: D&R flight timeline: EZY8532 departs Faro 11:35 AM, arrives London Gatwick 2:25 PM (Mon Aug 10). Drop them by 8:30 AM for 3-hour buffer. Earlier Lisbon arrival = more rest time for your family.

days.title: FLY HOME ✈️
days.subtitle: Goodbye Portugal 🇵🇹

activities.name: WAKE UP
activities.notes: Quick breakfast at hotel (if open) or grab pastries

activities.name: Walk to Lisbon Airport terminal
activities.notes: Hotel is AT the airport — 5 min walk. No car stress! (Car returned last night.)

activities.name: Check in for flight
activities.notes: LIS → LHR → SFO. United counter.

activities.name: Flight UA 6863 departs
activities.notes: Lisbon → London (2h 45m)

activities.name: Arrive London Heathrow
activities.notes: 2h 40m connection

activities.name: Flight UA 949 departs
activities.notes: London → San Francisco (11h)

activities.name: Arrive San Francisco (same day!)
activities.notes: Welcome home! 🏠

days.tip: Long flight day! Bring tablets, snacks, coloring books. Kids may sleep on London → SF leg. Time difference works in your favor! Buffer gained: By dropping the car last night, your morning is: walk 5 min → check in. No rental return queue, no fuel check, no finding the desk. You saved ~30 min of risk.
